title: Epic Fight: Curios Compat Extended
description: This mod add compatibility with Epic Fight player animation and Curios slots for Artifacts and L Ender's Cataclysm.
body:
Extends Curios accessory support under **Epic Fight**, with a focus on **Artifacts** and **L_Ender's Cataclysm**.

![Epic fight curios compat extended](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d72cf7d67bed2545b0032190f5c2786bf2fc3bf7.png)

With Epic Fight installed, Curios accessories (hats, gloves, boots, necklaces, belts...) often don't follow the animations correctly: they float, sit offset, appear flipped, or stay frozen. This add-on attaches them properly to Epic Fight's animated skeleton.

## What it fixes

- **Head**: follows your look direction (up/down, left/right), stays aligned while walking and crouching
- **Hands / gloves**: follow the arm animation (timing, swing, bending)
- **Feet / boots**: follow the leg animation
- **Necklaces, belts, talismans**: aligned and animated on the torso
- **Emissive layers**: glowing overlays (e.g. magical effects) render correctly

## Supported mods

Built and tested for:

- **Artifacts**
- **L_Ender's Cataclysm**

Other Curios mods may work if their accessories use standard humanoid models, but only these two are tested and supported here.

## Works alongside Epic Fight Curios Compat

This add-on builds on **Epic Fight x Curios Compat** by **Unitei**, which is required. Keep that mod installed: it handles the rest of the Curios ecosystem (Sophisticated Backpacks, and other common accessories), while this extension focuses on getting Artifacts and L_Ender's Cataclysm right.

 ## Compatibility

- **Minecraft: 1.21.1**
- **Loader: NeoForge 21.1+**

## Required dependencies

- [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- **Epic Fight x Curios Compat** (by Unitei)

Join my discord for any suggestion or question https://discord.gg/AG8B2kV5cX

## Credits

Built on top of **Epic Fight x Curios Compat** by **Unitei** (Apache-2.0).
